psalm-57-1.verse: Lord, be gracious to me, for my soul takes refuge in You. Help me hide under the shadow of Your wings until every storm passes by.
psalm-57-1.prayer: Lord, be gracious to me, for my soul takes refuge in You. Help me hide under the shadow of Your wings until every storm passes by.

psalm-57-2.verse: Father, I cry out to You, the Most High God. Thank You for accomplishing Your purpose in my life and guiding me with faithfulness.
psalm-57-2.prayer: Father, I cry out to You, the Most High God. Thank You for accomplishing Your purpose in my life and guiding me with faithfulness.

psalm-57-3.verse: Lord, send Your help from heaven and rescue me according to Your lovingkindness and truth. Strengthen my confidence in Your deliverance.
psalm-57-3.prayer: Lord, send Your help from heaven and rescue me according to Your lovingkindness and truth. Strengthen my confidence in Your deliverance.

psalm-57-4.verse: Father, when I feel surrounded by danger, fear, or opposition, protect my heart and help me remain faithful to You.
psalm-57-4.prayer: Father, when I feel surrounded by danger, fear, or opposition, protect my heart and help me remain faithful to You.

psalm-57-5.verse: Lord, be exalted above the heavens and let Your glory be over all the earth. May my life bring honor and praise to Your name.
psalm-57-5.prayer: Lord, be exalted above the heavens and let Your glory be over all the earth. May my life bring honor and praise to Your name.

psalm-57-6.verse: Father, protect me from hidden traps and discouragement. Lift me up when my soul feels bowed down.
psalm-57-6.prayer: Father, protect me from hidden traps and discouragement. Lift me up when my soul feels bowed down.

psalm-57-7.verse: Lord, make my heart steadfast in You. Help me praise You with confidence, even in difficult seasons.
psalm-57-7.prayer: Lord, make my heart steadfast in You. Help me praise You with confidence, even in difficult seasons.

psalm-57-8.verse: Father, awaken praise within me. Let my soul rise with worship, gratitude, and renewed hope in Your presence.
psalm-57-8.prayer: Father, awaken praise within me. Let my soul rise with worship, gratitude, and renewed hope in Your presence.

psalm-57-9.verse: Lord, help me give thanks to You among all people. Let my life declare Your goodness and faithfulness wherever I go.
psalm-57-9.prayer: Lord, help me give thanks to You among all people. Let my life declare Your goodness and faithfulness wherever I go.

psalm-57-10.verse: Father, Your lovingkindness is great to the heavens and Your truth reaches to the skies. Help me rest in Your unfailing love.
psalm-57-10.prayer: Father, Your lovingkindness is great to the heavens and Your truth reaches to the skies. Help me rest in Your unfailing love.

psalm-57-11.verse: Lord, be exalted above the heavens and let Your glory cover the earth. May everything in my life point back to Your greatness.
psalm-57-11.prayer: Lord, be exalted above the heavens and let Your glory cover the earth. May everything in my life point back to Your greatness.

psalm-57-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for being my refuge in every storm. Help me trust Your lovingkindness, rest under Your protection, and praise You with a steadfast heart. When fear or trouble surrounds me, remind me that You are faithful, powerful, and near. May my life continually declare Your glory, Your goodness, and Your truth.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-57-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for being my refuge in every storm. Help me trust Your lovingkindness, rest under Your protection, and praise You with a steadfast heart. When fear or trouble surrounds me, remind me that You are faithful, powerful, and near. May my life continually declare Your glory, Your goodness, and Your truth.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
